positive: A majestic, stylized mountain fox (kitsune) in a graceful, dynamic pose, mid-leap over a crystalline river. The fox has luminous fur, glowing ethereal elements like wispy tails and spectral smoke trailing behind it. The background features stylized, minimalist Japanese flora (cherry blossoms, bamboo shoots) and distant, geometrically sharp mountain peaks. High contrast, limited color palette focusing on deep indigo, sapphire blue, warm gold, and forest green. Composition is centered with the fox as the main subject, creating a strong, clean silhouette against the stylized nature backdrop. Vector art influence, clean lines, symmetrical elements, ready for screen printing.
negative: low detail, blurry, noisy, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logos, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grayscale, amateur, photorealistic
